taxon.author: (O. Pickard-Cambridge, 1880)
taxon.distribution: South America. Introduced to Canada, St. Helena, Europe, Canary Is. to Turkey and Egypt, Ethiopia, Kenya, Tanzania, Namibia, South Africa, China, Malaysia, Indonesia, New Zealand

referenceObject.reference: Pickard-Cambridge, O. (1880a). On some new and rare spiders from New Zealand, with characters of four new genera. Proceedings of the Zoological Society of London 47(4, 1879): 681-703, pl. 52-53. doi: 10.1111/j.1096-3642.1879.tb02701.x
